A 	Proven 	Approach for
Creating 	an 	Instant Surge of
Cash in Your Business
With Dave Dee
www.gkic.com
1.800.871.0147
www.facebook.com/gkicinsiderscircle
Instant 	Cash Flow
Surge 	Generator

inquiries from the Presentation.

yourself with certain limited background information
concerning GKIC and its business strategy, plans and
activities. 	If you have signed a confidentiality

agreement. If you do not agree to the terms of this
Notice, you may NOT view, copy or distribute any
portion of this Presentation.

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 4
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
How to Create an Instant Cash Flow Surge in Your
Business
Congratulations on getting this system that's going to help you get an
Instant Cash Flow Surge in your business.
I'm going to go through this system with you, and share
with you exactly how you can use it so you can get
results.
Purpose of System
Now what's the purpose of this entire system?
Well, it's many-­‐fold. The first thing is we wanted to give
you a tool that you can instantly use and get results from.
Here's the truth, we've used this tool at GKIC; in fact we use it over and over and
over again – and so have our members who we've shared this with.
You can rest assured that if you actually take this tool and use it, it will work for
you.
Obviously the major purpose of this is to create a Cash Flow Surge in your
business.
The beauty of this is you can use it anytime you want
to create a Cash Flow Surge in your business.
One of our overriding goals with this system is to help you transform your
marketing.
We want you to stop doing one-­‐off marketing things, one-­‐off marketing
techniques.
One of our
overriding goals
with this system is to
help you transform
your marketing.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 5
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
We want you to put all of your marketing into a system.
That's something that we teach in our flagship product, Magnetic Marketing, but
here we're going to give you a very specific system that you can take and that
you can use and that you'll get results from.
Finally we want you to prove to yourself, that – quite frankly – we're the real
deal; that GKIC can really help you grow your business.
You see by giving you this tool – that I'm going to implore you to use – you will
see that what we teach actually works.
The truth is you may have tried some different things in the past:
• 	Bought marketing books
• 	Taken courses
• 	Gone to seminars
… and they didn't work for you.
Well I was there. Many years ago – about 17 years ago – I wanted to be a
professional magician – that's right, a magician!
I had tried all kinds of stuff that didn't work – mostly stuff from inside my
industry.
Why Looking Inside Doesn’t Work
For example, inside the industry, we were taught to cold-­‐call to book magic
shows.
Well that didn't work for me, and it was a horrible, horrible existence.
But what I did is I discovered the founder of the company, Dan Kennedy.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 6
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
He was speaking at this event and he was talking about this principle called
Magnetic Marketing. In fact, at the end of his presentation, he offered a product
called the Magnetic Marketing System and Toolkit.
I ended up investing in that toolkit – when I didn't think I could afford it.
I took action on what Dan said to do and the results were absolutely, positively
amazing.
For the first time, I had a real system in my business,
and I went from doing three shows a month to
averaging over 25 shows a month – in less than 90
days.
Why?
Because I had a system that worked and I worked that system.
You may be thinking to yourself, “Okay that's good, you're a magician but I'm
not a magician.”
The beauty of this system is that it works for any business regardless of the
business that you're in.
• 	We have dentists who have used the Cash Flow Surge Generator.
• 	We have lawyers who have used the Cash Flow Surge Generator.
• 	We have restaurants who have used the Cash Flow Surge Generator.
… and on, and on, and on.
The Big Mistake
One of the biggest errors that business owners make is this one; and pay very
close attention to this because this will determine your success or your failure –
not only with this Cash Flow Surge Generator, but also with your marketing in
general.
I had a system that
worked and I
worked that system.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 7
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
The biggest mistake that you can make is to think,
“My business is different.”
Everyone thinks that their business is different – and that holds them back.
Here's something else that's really important for you to burn into your brain.
Successful business owners – our most successful GKIC members – say to
themselves, “How can I make what GKIC teaches work in my business? How
does it apply to my business?”
Unsuccessful business owners say, "That doesn't apply to my business."
Rest assured, everything that we're teaching you here works.
By the way, we've answered all of your objections with this:
• 	You don't have the time?
We've got it basically done for you; all you’ve got to do is model what we've
given you.
• 	You don't have the expertise in writing copy?
Guess what, we've given you models to follow.
This will work for you, you’ve just got to use it.
What’s Included
Okay, now let's go over exactly what you have in this system.
The first thing is a three-­‐day, three-­‐step e-­‐mail system that will create this
Instant Cash Flow Surge for you, whether you’ve got a product or a service. It
doesn't matter what it is.
We're going to share with you in this teaching how you can use it regardless of
what business you're in.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 8
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
We have people who say, "I'm a little embarrassed to say it, but I haven't been
collecting the e-­‐mail addresses of my customers (or clients or patients).”
That's not a problem.
Well actually, it is a problem. If you're not collecting the names and the e-­‐mail
addresses of your customers, clients, or patients, you need to start doing that
today.
How do you do it? Just simply ask them.
Let's say you haven't done it yet; that's not a problem.
Because what you can do is you can take these e-­‐mails and simply turn them
into direct mail letters.
In fact, the original Instant Cash Flow Surge Generator comes from our product
called Magnetic Marketing. In there, it is an actual letter that was sent out.
It doesn't matter; e-­‐mail, direct mail, it's basically the same – and we're going to
share with you how you can modify the e-­‐mails that came with this system, so
you can use it as direct mail.
Why is this the perfect place for you to start?
Well here's the truth; there's money hidden in your business right now. There's
money hidden in your customer, client or patient list.
The real value in your business is not in the building,
it's not in your equipment; it's in the people, it's in your
list of customers, your list of clients, your list of patients.
You see, they don't know it yet, but they are waiting to give you their money –
provided you offer them something that they want, something that they need or
something they desire.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 9
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
They're waiting to give you their money, and the fastest way to create an Instant
Cash Flow Surge is not to generate a whole bunch of new leads.
Yes, you do have to have a lead generation system in place, no question about it.
That's one of the most important things that we teach in Magnetic Marketing.
But for this specific problem, for this specific thing that we want to accomplish –
creating instant money, making your bank account swell – going to your current
list of customers, clients or patients is the way to do it.
The Emails Step by Step
All right, now let's go through each one of the e-­‐mails step by step. Remember
there's three e-­‐mails; if you can't do e-­‐mails don't worry about it, a little bit later
on I'll be teaching you how you can take these e-­‐mails, and turn them into
letters that you can put in the mail.
Let me just say something about that – because it's really, really important.
Direct mail, mailing your customers, still works. In fact it's working better than
it ever has before.
The reason is because fewer and fewer business owners are doing it – so your
mail piece stands out.
If you really want to amp up this system,
you will do both e-­‐mail and direct mail.
The truth is a lot of people, no matter how good
your e-­‐mail is, guess what – they're not reading it.
I know folks who don't check their e-­‐mail for over a
week.
They don't know it
yet, but they are
waiting to give you
their money.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 10
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
To me I find that amazing. I check my e-­‐mail at least once a day, twice a day,
three times a day, four times a day, maybe even more. But there are some
people who don't.
What you need to do, if you really want to amp up this system, is to do both
direct mail and e-­‐mail.
Day One Email
Okay, let's go over the Day One e-­‐mail and the psychology behind the Day One e-­‐
mail.
The first thing that you're going to do is you're going to tell a story that proves a
concept.
Story-­‐telling is one of the most powerful forms of marketing, and very few
business owners really know how to do it.
Here's something for you to remember;
stories invite interest while statements invite skepticism.
You want to tell a story, and you’ll notice in the
samples that we've given you, we are telling a story.
What does a story talk about? Well it talks about a
problem that your customer, client or patient can
relate to. It introduces a solution.
It sets up the problem that your customer can relate to and then it introduces a
solution.
You’ve got the problem and then the solution.
At the end of this e-­‐mail, you have a P.S. (post script) or a note that leads to your
solution, to the solution of the problem.
Direct mail is
working better than
it ever has before.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 11
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
But the real goal of the Day One e-­‐mail is to get them to read that first e-­‐mail.
So let me just review:
• 	You're going to tell a story.
• 	The story talks about a problem that your customer can relate to.
• 	It introduces a solution.
At the end, you have a P.S. or a note that leads to the solution to the problem –
them either buying something, calling in for an appointment, downloading
something or whatever it is.
The real goal of Day One is not really to sell them anything; it’s to get them to
read the e-­‐mail.
Day Two Email
Now let's go into Day Two and the psychology behind Day Two. This is an e-­‐mail
that introduces your solution to the problem.
In the first e-­‐mail, you've talked more about what
the problem is; in this e-­‐mail, you're really
talking about the solution to the problem.
One of the key points is that it references the
previous day’s e-­‐mail. When you go through the
sample, you'll see that this is exactly what it does. We didn't want you to miss
this so we wanted to give you this step-­‐by-­‐step instruction.
The second thing is that you need to sell the outcome or the transformation.
What does that mean? You need to let your customer know that the outcome or
the transformation that this is going to provide really works, and is really
something that they want.
A powerful way to do that is to mention a guarantee, to have a guarantee.
You need to sell the
outcome or the
transformation.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 12
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
You could also have a bonus.
Let's talk a little bit about guarantees for a second, because every business can
offer some type of guarantee.
You may not be able to guarantee the outcome of your service for example, but
you can guarantee a part of your service.
For example, my doctor has a guarantee that, if I have an appointment, I will be
in within five minutes of my appointment time; that's his guarantee.
Now he can't guarantee me that, if I'm sick, he's going to make me better; but he
can guarantee that.
Think about is there something in your business that you can guarantee?
Now maybe there's a bonus that you want to offer. Bonuses are very powerful;
bonuses help move the sale. So is there something cool that you can offer?
By the way, it can be an unrelated bonus. I once worked with an estate planning
attorney who, during Valentine’s Day, had this promotion that, if a husband and
wife came to her office for an initial consultation about an estate plan, they
would get a dinner for two at a romantic Italian restaurant. That was a bonus
offer.
The goal of the Day Two e-­‐mail is to get your customer
to go to the “sales page.”
The reason I put “sales page” in quotes is that maybe you are selling an actual
product – that's fantastic, that's what we often do at GKIC.
But it doesn't necessarily mean that you're selling a product; you could be
offering a consultation and the sales page gives them instructions about how to
take advantage of the consultation that you're offering.
You could be offering them a special romantic evening at your restaurant, as
another example.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 13
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
So the sales page doesn't necessarily need to be selling a product, it needs to be
selling the next step in your process.
Let's again review the Day Two e-­‐mail:
• 	This is an e-­‐mail that introduces your solution to the problem that you
talked about the day before.
• 	It does reference the previous day’s e-­‐mail.
• 	It sells the outcome or the transformation that you're saying the person
is going to have.
• 	It mentions a bonus and a guarantee – so think about what you can offer
as a bonus and what you can offer as a guarantee.
The goal of the Day Two e-­‐mail is to get them to click on a link, and go to a sales
page where the continuation happens – whatever happens next in your process.
Day Three Email
Now let's move on to Day Three. The Day Three e-­‐mail, again as in e-­‐mail
number two, references the previous e-­‐mail. This e-­‐mail highlights the bonuses
and sells the bonus.
Remember we offered a bonus in the second e-­‐mail.
In this e-­‐mail what we're doing is we're highlighting
that bonus, and maybe even adding on an additional
bonus.
Sometimes people will take action just to take advantage of the bonus that you
offer. By the way your bonus could be a special report, it could be a book; it
could be, as I just mentioned, a dinner for two.
You have to open up your mind to the possibilities of what bonuses you could
offer. “What are some things that my customers, clients or patients would really,
really want?”
The sales page needs
to be selling the next
step in your process.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 14
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
The next thing is… and this is really important.
You want to discuss what will happen if they don't buy.
As Tony Robbins teaches, people are motivated by twin opposing forces – pain
and pleasure.
Right now, in the first two emails, we have been
basically talking about all the pleasure that they'll get
by taking advantage of the opportunity that you're
presenting to them.
In this one, we're going to use pain; we're going to
talk about what will happen if they don't take advantage of the opportunity that
you're giving them.
Again you can see how this is all laid out in the samples that we've given you.
The next thing is you want to overcome objections.
One of the most important things that you can do in any type of selling… by the
way, make no doubt about it, you're actually selling here. Now you're not selling
face-­‐to-­‐face; you're using email as your selling tool but you're selling.
I don't know a way to create an Instant Cash Flow Surge without making an
offer and without selling; that’s really important.
One of the most important things that you can do in
any type of sales presentation is make a list of all of
the possible objections that your customer might have.
Why wouldn't they take advantage of this opportunity? Then you want to work
out in advance how you could answer those objections.
In this email, the Day Three email, you answer the objections; why wouldn't
somebody take advantage of your opportunity?
People are
motivated by twin
opposing forces –
pain and pleasure.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 15
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
Then you have the all-­‐important P.S.
The P.S. in the Day Three email highlights the deadlines.
We didn't talk a lot about deadlines; we will in a little bit but deadlines are really
mission critical. If there's no deadline, there's no sense of urgency.
Remember, we're talking here about people who weren't expecting to give you
any money.
We're asking them to take action and give you additional money that they
weren't planning on.
If you don't have a deadline, if there's no sense of urgency, either in time or in
quantity, then it's going to be very difficult to move people to action.
This is all about moving massive amounts of people
to action as quickly as possible.
The time deadline is based around a date; e.g. this thing goes away on Friday.
We do a lot of that at GKIC. We'll do something called the Web Deal of the
Weekend. Well, guess what, it runs over the weekend
and it expires on Monday.
Everyone knows because in the email we say it expires
on Monday, and then once it's gone, it's gone.
What we'll notice is a surge of additional sales right at
the deadline.
People have been thinking about it, they got the deadline in their mind.
The other thing is a quantity deadline. Let's say that you're selling a book or
you're selling a consultation.
Let's use consultation as an example. There's literally only so many that you can
do. You can say this is for the first 10 people and once that's done, it's done.
If there's no deadline,
there's no sense of
urgency.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 16
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
That's what you do in the Day Three email:
• 	You reference the previous email.
• 	You highlight the bonuses.
• 	You discuss what will happen if they don't buy.
• 	You overcome objections.
• 	The P.S. highlights the deadline.
The Keys to Direct Response
Now let's talk about a really important subject.
We’ve kind of skirted around it but it's about using Direct Response marketing
in all of the marketing that you're doing, not just in the Cash Flow Surge
sequence that we've given you here.
This is one of the most important sections of this training.
• 	What makes Direct Response direct response?
• 	What's the difference between Direct Response and image advertising?
Well, most business owners are doing image advertising.
They look at the big advertisers and the people that are spending millions or
even billions of dollars on marketing and they say, "Those companies are really
successful, therefore I should model what they're doing."
You can't do that. You see, as an entrepreneur, as a small business owner, when
we put money out, we need that money to come back fairly quickly and bring
friends with it!
An image advertiser doesn't care about that because they can spend a whole
bunch of money on “just getting their name out there.”
You can't do that; you shouldn't do that. It's a big waste of money.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 16 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 17
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
Let's talk about what makes “Direct Response” direct response.
Headlines
The first thing in every Direct Response marketing piece – whether it's a
newspaper ad, whether it's a letter on a website, whether it's the first thing that
comes out of your mouth – is a headline.
The headline is what we call the ad for your ad.
In an email, the headline is the subject line. You see, there's really nothing new
under the sun.
The subject line or the headline is mission critical because
that's what gets people interested in reading more.
If it's in a newspaper ad or on a postcard or something like that, the headline
gets them to read the rest.
The subject line gets them to click and open the
email; you need to spend time on creating powerful
subject lines and powerful headlines.
You'll see exactly how we did that in the samples that
are included with this kit.
Telling Stories
The next thing we talked about is telling a story. We've already gone over this in
detail and I encourage you to listen to this more than once, so you can get all the
nuances.
Storytelling is one of the most powerful marketing tools that you can use
because it engages your prospect, it engages your customer.
The headline is what
we call the ad for
your ad.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 17 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 18
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
As children, we've been taught, “Let me tell you a story.” What happens? We
perk up; we listen, it's ingrained in us.
The Offer or Value Proposition
The next thing – and this is where most people mess up – is in the offer or the
value proposition.
What I'm about to say could really change so much for you.
Now, there's a whole bunch more we need to talk about here as it comes to the
offer but, for this training, if you just get this one thing, you'll be light years
ahead of your competition.
Here’s what it is:
You're not selling your product, you're not selling your service;
you're selling the outcome, you're selling the transformation.
Regardless of what you're selling, you're not selling
your product or service, you're selling the outcome
that your customer wants, that your customer needs
or that your customer desires.
This is such an important concept.
For, example, when I saw the founder, Dan Kennedy
speak, he wasn't selling me the toolkit with the copyright-­‐free marketing
documents and the CDs and all of that stuff; he wasn't selling me that.
What he was selling me on was the fact that, if I took this toolkit, and I used it, I
would explode my business.
• 	I would make more money
• 	I would book more shows
• 	I would be successful
Storytelling is one of
the most powerful
marketing tools you
can use.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 18 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 19
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
That's what he was selling me. He wasn't selling me on the actual product.
If you can get this and change your offers to focus on the outcome that your
prospect wants, it's going to make your marketing so much more powerful.
Call to Action
The next thing, as far as Direct Response goes, is a CTA. Circle that in red and put
stars next to it. CTA stands for a “call to action.”
In Direct Response, we are looking for, well, a direct response.
We're looking for people to take action.
We're not looking to just get our name out there and hopefully they'll remember
us.
We're telling them specifically what we want them to do
and your call to action must be precise and detailed.
Tell them exactly what you want them to do:
• 	If you want them to pick up the phone, tell them to pick up the phone and
put out their index finger and dial these numbers.
• 	If you want them to click on the link, tell them to click on the link.
• 	If you want them to come into your store on Saturday between 10 and 11
to get the special bonus, tell them, “Put it on your calendar right now; set
your alarm so you're in the store to get the special bonus on Saturday
between 10 and 11.”
Bonuses, Guarantees and Deadlines
The next thing that makes Direct Response direct response is that, in most cases,
there are some bonuses.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 19 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 20
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
We talked a lot about bonuses but bonuses can help drive the sale.
Also in Direct Response, something we've talked about is a guarantee. What can
you guarantee in your business?
If you immediately say “Nothing,” take a step back, take a pause, take a breath;
think about, “What part of my product or service can I actually guarantee?”
The other thing that makes “Direct Response” direct response are deadlines.
We talked a lot about deadlines – that happens in email number three.
By the way, you probably mentioned your deadlines in the other emails as well;
but in email #3 you really focus on the deadline – when this thing is going away.
Again in direct response:
• 	There’s a headline
• 	There’s a story
• 	There’s 	an 	offer; 	remember 	what 	the 	offer 	is 	about, 	that’s 	really
important
• 	There's a CTA, a call to action
• 	There may be bonuses
• 	There may be a guarantee
• 	There's a deadline
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 24 --

I NSTANT C ASH F LOW S URGE G ENERATOR 	P AGE 21
© 2014 GKIC 	www.gkic.com
Offers This Works For
Now what type of offers does this Cash Flow Surge Generator work for?
Well, it works if you're running some type of special. Like I mentioned, at GKIC,
we have the Web Deal of the Weekend – where we take one of our products,
we'll feature it and we'll make it into a special.
By the way, it doesn't necessarily mean that you are discounting what you are
selling. It doesn't necessarily mean that at all. In fact, we rarely do that.
What we'll do is we'll add on extra bonuses. So this works great for specials.
I mentioned a restaurant example earlier; maybe you're having a special
consultation session; if you're a tax attorney maybe you're going to have a
special seminar. It works wonderfully for that as well.
It's also a wonderful way to introduce new products
or new services to your customers.
Remember this whole Cash Flow Surge Generator is not designed to generate
leads; it's not to go outside of your list. It's to go to what we call your “raving
fans.”
We talk a lot about raving fans at GKIC and that's what you want to create.
So, again, there are two ways that you want to use this.
• 	To offer specials
• 	When you're introducing products or services
Now, don't do this every single week. You want to use this sparingly because, as
we like to say in the business, “a tactic known is a tactic blown.”
Plan this in your marketing calendar.
• 	You do have a marketing calendar, don't you?
www.getwsodownload.com

• 	You do have your campaigns already laid out for the entire year, don't
you?
If not, then make sure that you do that as well.
Who This Is For
Let's talk about who this Cash Flow System is for and let me tell you who it's not
for.
First of all, this is not for you if you are not going to do anything with it. This is
not for you if you just look at it and say "Hey, this isn't going to work for my
business because my business is different. I don't care what you say, Dave, my
business is different, it might have worked for you as a magician, which is like
every other business on the planet, but it won't work for me."
All right, so this is not for you. The truth is becoming a GKIC member is not for
you either, if you're like that.
We want:
• 	People who are positive
• 	People who are motivated
• 	People who are action-­‐takers
• 	People who get results
So who is this for?
This is for the person who's an action-­‐taker, who wants to get results, who's
positive, who's a doer, who believes that “If it's going to be, it's up to me.”
Here is the truth, if you take action on the tools
that we've given you here, you will get results.

Remember the subject line; if you're going to do direct mail, the subject line is
the headline.
It’s very easy to modify these templates. Obviously, you're not going to say “click
here” if you're sending a letter out. You're going to need some kind of order
form or put in your telephone number or some other CTA, some other call to
action.
Again, as I've mentioned over and over again, this is
all proven.
At GKIC, we've made over $250,000 from the five
templates that are included; all you’ve got to do is
take them and modify them.

frankly, they're not going to do anything with this.
